items.title: Japan Just Dropped an AI That Beats Claude (Fable 5)
items.description:
🔗 Join our FREE WhatsApp Community: https://links.stayingahead.com/YT49 

America just banned its best AI, Claude (Fable 5)  so I put Japan’s new Sakana Fugu up against it, head to head. 5 prompts, 5 rounds, one winner. Here’s whether the AI that no government can switch off actually beats Claude.

Last week the US ordered Anthropic’s Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5 offline for everyone outside America. Days later, Japan’s Sakana AI dropped Fugu  a multi-agent “team in one prompt” that can’t be export-banned. So I ran both on the same 5 builds: an AI learning roadmap, a 2D game, a NEO UI redesign, the One Wish Willow site, and a full equity-research war room on Reliance. Here’s who actually won.

RESOURCES & LINKS
• My full Fable 5 / Claude test: https://youtu.be/iH5vjVacPG8?si=B0zZkgYXf-1CGL7h
• Sakana Fugu: https://sakana.ai/fugu/

#SakanaFugu #Claude #AI #ArtificialIntelligence #JapanAI
--------

items.channel_label: Build Great Products — AI product design, app advising
items.title: The Secret System I Use to Build & Launch Real Apps in 24 Hours (With Claude Code, Codex or Cursor)
items.description:
🚀 Get BuilderOS and build any app in 24 hours @ https://www.skool.com/aiapps/about

We've all been tricked by the marketing slogans of app building tools like Lovable, Bolt and Replit. But what if there was a way to build real applications with real AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex and Cursor, in just 24 hour?

Well, you're in luck, because I've built the exact system to help you do this - it's called BuilderOS - and it helps you go from idea to live app in less than a day, all using a simple set of AI skills you can install in any project.

Plus, I've created a full course to get started with BuilderOS inside of my community, so you can start building your dream app idea and launch it by tomorrow.

Chapters:

00:00 Introducing a system to build and launch any app in 24 hours.
01:06 What is Builder OS?
02:29 The four phases of Builder OS: Ideate, Plan & Design, Build, and Launch.
04:27 The Ideate Phase: Using AI to find and validate your app idea.
06:18 The Plan Phase: Creating an AI-friendly Product Requirements Document (PRD) and roadmap.
09:28 The Design Phase: Generating a design system from a reference image.
11:12 The Build Phase: Using a 'build loop' to code the entire application.
14:34 The Launch Phase: Using a checklist to get your app live.
15:39 How to install and set up Builder OS in your project.
16:26 What comes next: A brief overview of Product OS.
17:25 Showcase of products launched using this system.

Follow on social:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashbychris/
https://x.com/chris_bgp

items.channel_label: Y Combinator — startup frameworks, AI-native agencies
items.title: Zynga Founder: Consumer Is Not Investible Right Now - Thats Why You Should Build It
items.description:
Mark Pincus is the founder of Zynga and author of "Life at the Speed of Play: Launch Products People Love", which distills the product philosophy and founder playbook he developed across five companies. In this episode of the Main Function, Pincus sits down with Garry to talk about consumer in the AI age and why the opportunity has never been greater.  

https://www.lifeatthespeedofplay.com/

Apply to Y Combinator: https://www.ycombinator.com/apply
Work at a startup: https://www.ycombinator.com/jobs

06:19 — The Opus 4.5 Moment
09:46 — Proven, Better, New
12:59 — Why Investors are wrong about consumer

items.channel_label: Build Great Products — AI product design, app advising
items.title: This insane set of AI skills let's you build full apps in just 24 hours
items.description:
Struggling to build apps that actually work with AI? I got you.

BuilderOS is my personal system to build apps in 24 hours. Here's how it works.

First, you find an idea people actually want.

Then, validate it against market signals.

Once you've done that, you plan it to create your PRD and roadmap, create your design system.

And then build it all in one go using the Build MVP skill.

I've used this multiple times to build full apps and launch them in a day.

And I teach people how to do this inside my community over at skool.com/aiapps

Comment BUILD below if you want the link to get started.

items.channel_label: Paul J Lipsky — non-technical AI user, tools for business
items.title: Build a Self Improving Claude Knowledge Base
items.description:
#ZapierPartner Sponsored by Zapier! Zapier MCP levels you up, connecting you directly to apps to automate your workflow. Start building with Zapier MCP today:  https://bit.ly/3QDA0xF

Build a knowledge base that organizes itself and gets smarter every night. In this video I show you the exact Karpathy-style "LLM wiki" setup I run, built in Claude Cowork with plain markdown files you view in Obsidian. You drop your notes, articles, and transcripts in, the AI builds a connected map of everything you know, and a nightly scheduled task keeps it updated while you sleep. 

Resources:
Zapier MCP: https://bit.ly/3QDA0xF
Obsidian: https://obsidian.md/
Obsidian Web Clipper: https://obsidian.md/clipper
Free setup prompts (Google Doc): https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OuGOpp8aJkUtGSH55qy-OHmI94HexeXZAGz_XcY8-P0/edit?usp=sharing


This video is sponsored by Zapier.

items.title: How to Stay Focused
items.description:
Before saying you have ADD: put your phone in another room, turn off notifications, plug your ears, make a list, then work on the list.

You focus by removing everything but the work, not adding things.

Give yourself a chance before you say you have a disorder.
